testcase.name: View portfolio summary dashboard
testcase.system-out: Given the user is on the login page.........................................passed When the user enters valid credentials......................................passed And the user clicks the login button........................................passed Then the user should be logged in successfully..............................passed When the user navigates to the portfolio dashboard..........................passed Then the portfolio summary should be displayed..............................passed And the total assets value should be visible................................passed

testcase.name: Generate a quarterly financial report
testcase.system-out: Given the user is on the login page.........................................passed When the user enters valid credentials......................................passed And the user clicks the login button........................................passed Then the user should be logged in successfully..............................passed When the user selects report type "Quarterly Statement".....................passed And the user sets the date range from "2024-01-01" to "2024-03-31"..........passed And the user generates the report...........................................passed Then the report should be generated successfully............................passed And the report should be available for download.............................passed

testcase.name: Generate an annual financial report
testcase.system-out: Given the user is on the login page.........................................passed When the user enters valid credentials......................................passed And the user clicks the login button........................................passed Then the user should be logged in successfully..............................passed When the user selects report type "Annual Summary"..........................passed And the user sets the date range from "2024-01-01" to "2024-12-31"..........passed And the user generates the report...........................................passed Then the report should be generated successfully............................passed And the report should be available for download.............................passed
